# FaceClone Design System — "The Archive"

> *This is serious software.*

**Design direction:** Editorial/Modernist · **Aesthetic name:** The Archive
**Date:** 2026-07-12
**Source:** Generated by `/design-consultation` (with `/plan-eng-review` and `/plan-design-review` validation)

## 1. Design Philosophy

FaceClone is positioned as a **portfolio piece** — a social web application that demonstrates serious engineering and design capability. Every visual decision serves the narrative: *this is not a toy, this is production-grade software with editorial taste.*

### Core principles

1. **Content is the hero.** The UI recedes. Warm neutrals create a canvas where posts, photos, and connections take focus.
2. **Depth signals craftsmanship.** Subtle 3D effects (card tilt, glass navbar, parallax) reward exploration without overwhelming. The depth isn't noticed until it's gone.
3. **Typography as identity.** A deliberate three-font stack sets the tone: precise sans for structure, warm serif for reading, monospace for data.
4. **Restraint over novelty.** One accent color. One decorative risk (serif body text). Everything else is execution.

---

## 2. Color Palette

### Light mode

| Token | Value | Usage |
|-------|-------|-------|
| `--bg` | `#F4F1EC` | Page background |
| `--bg-raised` | `#EBE7E0` | Card backgrounds, secondary surfaces |
| `--surface` | `#FFFFFF` | Primary surface (cards, modals, nav) |
| `--surface-raised` | `#FAF8F5` | Hover state for surfaces |
| `--text-primary` | `#1A1817` | Body text, headings |
| `--text-secondary` | `#5A554F` | Subtle body text |
| `--text-muted` | `#8A847C` | Metadata, timestamps, placeholders |
| `--text-inverse` | `#EBE5DE` | Text on dark backgrounds |
| `--accent` | `#D4A857` | Primary actions, active states, highlights — **brass** |
| `--accent-hover` | `#C49A47` | Accent hover/focus |
| `--accent-muted` | `rgba(212, 168, 87, 0.15)` | Accent backgrounds, highlights |
| `--link` | `#8AB4D6` | Links only — **steel blue** |
| `--link-hover` | `#6E9FBE` | Link hover |
| `--border` | `#E0DBD4` | Default borders, dividers |
| `--border-strong` | `#C4BEB6` | Focused/active borders, inputs |
| `--success` | `#5A8F6A` | Success states |
| `--warning` | `#C4953A` | Warning states |
| `--error` | `#B85C4A` | Error states |
| `--info` | `#8AB4D6` | Informational states |

### Dark mode

| Token | Value | Notes |
|-------|-------|-------|
| `--bg` | `#1A1817` | Match text-primary from light mode |
| `--bg-raised` | `#252220` | One step up from bg |
| `--surface` | `#2F2B28` | Card surface |
| `--surface-raised` | `#373330` | Hover surface |
| `--text-primary` | `#EBE5DE` | Inverse of light text |
| `--text-secondary` | `#B8B0A8` | Reduced contrast for dark bg |
| `--text-muted` | `#8A847C` | Same as light (muted is neutral) |
| `--accent` | `#D4A857` | **Brass stays** — brand constancy |
| `--accent-hover` | `#E2BE6A` | Brighter on dark bg |
| `--accent-muted` | `rgba(212, 168, 87, 0.12)` | More subtle on dark |
| `--link` | `#6E9FBE` | Slightly dimmer for dark bg |
| `--link-hover` | `#8AB4D6` | Back to light link |
| `--border` | `#3A3532` | Darker border |
| `--border-strong` | `#4A4440` | Stronger border on dark |
| `--success/warning/error/info` | Same values | Semantic colors stay constant |

---

## 3. Typography

### Font stack

| Role | Font | Source | Fallback |
|------|------|--------|----------|
| **UI / Headings** | **Satoshi** | Fontshare (api.fontshare.com) | `-apple-system, sans-serif` |
| **Body / Reading** | **Instrument Serif** | Google Fonts | `Georgia, serif` |
| **Data / Metadata** | **JetBrains Mono** | Google Fonts | `'SF Mono', monospace` |

### Type scale

| Token | Size | Weight | Leading | Usage |
|-------|------|--------|---------|-------|
| `h1` | 40px / 2.5rem | 700 | 1.15 | Hero, 404 pages |
| `h2` | 28px / 1.75rem | 600 | 1.2 | Page headings |
| `h3` | 20px / 1.25rem | 600 | 1.3 | Section headings |
| `h4` | 16px / 1rem | 500 | 1.4 | Card titles, form labels |
| `h5` | 14px / 0.875rem | 600 | 1.4 | Small headings |
| `h6` | 14px / 0.875rem | 600 | 1.4 | Card sub-headings |
| `body` | 17px / 1.0625rem | 400 | 1.7 | Post body text (Instrument Serif) |
| `ui` | 14px / 0.875rem | 500 | 1.5 | Buttons, nav, labels (Satoshi) |
| `small` | 13px / 0.8125rem | 400 | 1.5 | Secondary text (Satoshi) |
| `mono` | 13px / 0.8125rem | 400 | 1.5 | Dates, counts, metadata (JetBrains Mono) |

### Typography rules

- All heading letter-spacing: `-0.02em`
- Small labels (nav-label class): uppercase, letter-spacing `0.08em`, font-size `11px` / `0.6875rem`, color `--text-muted`
- Body text in Instrument Serif ONLY in feed posts, article content, long-form reading. UI text (buttons, nav, cards, forms, settings) stays in Satoshi.
- Monospace for timestamps, numerical data, code snippets only.

---

## 4. Spacing & Layout

### Spacing scale

Base unit: **4px**. Follows a non-linear scale.

| Token | Value |
|-------|-------|
| `--space-xs` | 4px |
| `--space-sm` | 8px |
| `--space-md` | 16px |
| `--space-lg` | 24px |
| `--space-xl` | 32px |
| `--space-2xl` | 48px |

### Layout parameters

- **Max content width:** 1120px
- **Grid:** 12-column responsive grid
- **Feed layout:** 3-column at desktop (nav 200px / feed 1fr / context 240px)
- **Forms:** max-width 400px for single-column forms

### Density rules

- **Comfortable** between sections (padding: `--space-xl`)
- **Tight** within components (padding: `--space-md`)
- **Compact** for data displays (padding: `--space-sm`)

---

## 5. Shadows & Depth

### Shadow presets

| Token | Value | Usage |
|-------|-------|-------|
| `--shadow-sm` | `0 1px 2px rgba(26, 24, 23, 0.06)` | Cards resting |
| `--shadow-md` | `0 2px 8px rgba(26, 24, 23, 0.08)` | Cards hover, dropdowns |
| `--shadow-lg` | `0 4px 16px rgba(26, 24, 23, 0.10)` | Modals, popovers |

Dark mode shadows use `rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3/0.4/0.5)` with the same Y-offsets and spread.

### 3D depth system (CSS, post-DESIGN.md implementation)

- **Card tilt**: max 8° rotation, 400ms transition, scale 1.02 on hover — implemented via VanillaTilt.js v1.8.0 (2KB)
- **Glass navbar**: `backdrop-filter: blur(12px) saturate(180%)` with `rgba(24,119,242,0.75)` background — blue-tinted glass preserving brand identity
- **Avatar float**: `translateZ(20px)` via VanillaTilt's `translateZ` option on card elements (images AND placeholder initials)
- **Parallax**: IntersectionObserver-based scroll-driven translateZ (-10px to +30px)
- **Keyboard focus tilt**: `.js .post-card:focus-within` triggers same tilt as hover, with explicit `outline: 2px solid #1877f2; outline-offset: 2px`

### 3D progressive enhancement

1. `.no-js` → fully flat (Django pagination fallback)
2. `prefers-reduced-motion` → fully flat
3. `@supports (transform-style: preserve-3d)` gates 3D CSS
4. Safari → CSS-only subtle transform (no VanillaTilt JS) per known rendering issue
5. Touch devices → CSS float animation instead of tilt (44px min tap targets)

---

## 6. Z-Depth Presets

For the 3D Depth UI implementation (P1, documented in `musth-main-design-20260712-112546.md`):

| Layer | Z-index | Element |
|-------|---------|---------|
| `--z-base` | `1` | Content |
| `--z-overlay` | `1040` | Dropdowns, datepicker popups |
| `--z-sticky` | `1050` | Sticky navbar |
| `--z-modal-backdrop` | `1060` | Modal backdrops |
| `--z-modal` | `1070` | Modal dialogs |
| `--z-tooltip` | `1080` | Tooltips |
| `--z-toast` | `1090` | Notifications/toasts |

CSS 3D perspective values:
- Perspective container: `perspective: 1000px`
- `transform-style: preserve-3d` on tilt cards
- `will-change: transform` on tilt cards and glass navbar
- `translateZ(30px)` on glass navbar (above card content)
- `translateZ(20px)` on avatars (above card surface)
- `translateZ(-10px)` on card backgrounds (below card surface)

---

## 7. Border Radius

| Token | Value | Usage |
|-------|-------|-------|
| `--radius-sm` | 4px | Buttons, inputs, alerts |
| `--radius-md` | 8px | Cards, modals, panels |
| `--radius-lg` | 12px | Large containers, hero sections |
| `--radius-full` | 9999px | **Avatars only** |

No pill shapes on buttons or badges. Flat 4px radius is the default — consistent with the editorial, serious aesthetic.

---

## 8. Components

### Buttons

- Style: Compact, flat 4px radius
- Sizes: default (14px / 8px padding) + small (13px / 4px padding)
- Variants: Primary (accent brass fill), Secondary (border only, accent on hover), Ghost (transparent, accent bg on hover)
- States: Default, Hover, Active, Focus (accent ring via box-shadow), Disabled (opacity 0.5)

### Form inputs

- Style: Flat border, 4px radius
- Focus state: `border-color: var(--accent)` + `box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px var(--accent-muted)`
- Error state: `border-color: var(--error)` + red hint text
- Labels: 13px, 500 weight, Satoshi

### Cards

- Style: White surface, 8px radius, `--shadow-sm` resting, `--shadow-md` hover
- Padding: `--space-md` (16px) inside
- Structure: Header (avatar + name + timestamp), Body, Footer (action bar)
- Feed cards: Optional tilt effect per 3D depth system

### Navbar

- Style: Blue-tinted glass, `backdrop-filter: blur(12px)`, sticky top
- Background: `rgba(24, 119, 242, 0.75)` — preserves Facebook blue brand
- Avatar: 28px rounded, aligned with nav text
- Dropdown: `--shadow-md`, `--surface` background

### Alerts

- Style: Flat, 4px radius, muted background with left border accent
- Types: success (green), warning (amber), error (red), info (blue)

### Navigation rails

- Style: Pane with iconless typographic items
- Active state: Brass left border (2px) + brass text
- Hover: `--accent-muted` background

---

## 9. Dark Mode

Dark mode is a first-class citizen, not an afterthought. Implemented via `[data-theme="dark"]` attribute on `<html>`.

**Rule:** Dark mode inverts luminosity while preserving hue relationships. Warm neutrals stay warm (not cool gray). Brass accent stays identical — it's the single point of brand constancy across modes.

### Specific adjustments

- Text contrast: primary text is `#EBE5DE` (not pure white) to reduce eye strain
- Borders: `#3A3532` (visible but soft)
- Surface layers step up in lightness: bg → bg-raised → surface
- Shadows: darker and more diffuse (higher opacity, same blur)
- Brass accent hover brightens (`#E2BE6A`) rather than darkening
- Accent muted backgrounds use lower opacity (0.12 vs 0.15)

### Toggle

- Toggle button in navbar top-right
- Default: respect `prefers-color-scheme` media query
- Choice persisted to `localStorage`

---

## 10. Accessibility

### Motion

- `prefers-reduced-motion` disables all 3D transforms, parallax, and tilt effects
- CSS transitions default to 150-200ms; 3D tilt at 400ms
- No auto-playing animations

### Focus

- Tilt enabled on `:focus-within` for keyboard users
- Visible focus outline: `outline: 2px solid #1877f2; outline-offset: 2px` on `:focus-visible`
- Focus ring uses Facebook blue (high contrast) rather than brass accent

### Touch

- Minimum 44x44px tap targets on mobile (like, comment, share buttons)
- Cards use CSS float animation instead of JS tilt on touch devices

### Color contrast

- Text primary (#1A1817) on surface (#FFFFFF): ratio ~14:1 (AAA)
- Text secondary (#5A554F) on surface (#FFFFFF): ratio ~5.5:1 (AA)
- Text muted (#8A847C) on surface (#FFFFFF): ratio ~3:1 — for metadata only, not body text
- Accent (#D4A857) on surface (#FFFFFF): ratio ~2.5:1 — decorative only, never carries information

---

## 11. Implementation Notes

### CSS custom properties

All design tokens are defined as CSS custom properties on `:root` and `[data-theme="dark"]`. The theme toggle swaps `data-theme` on `<html>` — all properties update automatically.

### File structure

```
static/css/
  ├── base.css          — Global resets, base typography, spacing, layout
  ├── depth.css         — 3D transforms, perspective, glass effects, parallax
  └── components.css    — (optional) Component-specific styles

static/js/
  ├── main.js           — Global interactions (alert dismiss, textarea counter)
  └── feed-3d.js        — VanillaTilt init, MutationObserver, IntersectionObserver, AJAX load-more
```

### Progressive enhancement chain

1. **JS disabled** (`.no-js` class) → fully functional flat UI with Django pagination
2. **prefers-reduced-motion** → all 3D effects disabled
3. **`@supports (backdrop-filter: blur(1px))`** gates glass navbar
4. **`@supports (transform-style: preserve-3d)`** gates 3D card effects
5. **Safari detection** → CSS-only subtle transform (no VanillaTilt JS)
6. **Touch detection** → CSS float animation, no JS tilt

### Font loading strategy

- Satoshi: loaded via Fontshare CSS API (`api.fontshare.com/v2/css`)
- Instrument Serif + JetBrains Mono: loaded via Google Fonts CSS API
- `font-display: swap` on all @font-face declarations
- System font stack shown until custom fonts load
